standard contractual clauses

Domestic transfers: cybersecurity telemetry and audit logs may be relayed to the Sand Data & AI Authority (SDAA) supervised government cloud through “NadrahNet” connectors; such transfers remain within the Kingdom and follow PDPL transfer controls.

Cross-border transfers occur only with an adequacy decision or a permit and are documented in our transfer registry; standard contractual clauses with processors include onward transfer restrictions and breach notification duties.

Security: we apply pseudonymisation, encryption at rest and in transit, privileged access management, and quarterly access reviews aligned to national cybersecurity control baselines (v1.0, internal standard).

Complaints: you may contact our DPO office at dpo@rimal-oasis.example.sa; unresolved PDPL complaints can be raised through the Kingdom data authority’s public portal in accordance with applicable guidance.
